name: Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information
description: The product transmits sensitive data such as credentials, tokens, or encryption keys in cleartext across a communication channel that can be sniffed by unauthorized actors, enabling interception of the unprotected information.
detection_pattern: Sensitive data flows from a TRANSFORM or STORAGE node to an EGRESS or EXTERNAL[network] node that transmits over an unencrypted channel (HTTP, plaintext protocol) without passing through a TRANSFORM[encryption] or EXTERNAL[tls] node that encrypts the transport
